mapper.insert: INSERT INTO GROUP1 ( g_id, id, g_title, category, user_max, price, area, addr1, addr2, latitude, longitude, start_date, last_date, comment1, comment2, type ) VALUES ( group1_seq.nextval, 1, #{g_title}, #{category}, #{user_max}, #{price}, substr(#{addr1},6,2), #{addr1}, #{addr2}, #{latitude}, #{longitude}, #{start_date}, #{last_date}, #{comment1}, #{comment2}, #{type} )
mapper.select: SELECT g_id, g_title, category, user_max, price, area, comment2, type FROM GROUP1 WHERE type='${type}'
SELECT g_id, id, g_title FROM GROUP1 WHERE g_id='${gId}'
